progress_summary: Second bug-check run on this project. Diff is lighthouserc.cjs (LHCI config) plus two checkpoint JSON files (.checkpoints/app-architect, .checkpoints/bug-check). No application source touched. Ran the relevant subset: checkpoint schema validation (npm run checkpoint:validate, all 6 valid), Node parse check on lighthouserc.cjs (require() succeeds), and secret scan (no matches). Type-check, lint, vitest, build, and dep-audit are not applicable to a config-only diff and were skipped. Verdict PASS.

key_decisions: Diff is checkpoint-only (.checkpoints/ux-engineer.checkpoint.json) — source-code checks (tsc, eslint, vitest, build, npm audit) intentionally skipped as N/A.
Schema validation via npm run checkpoint:validate is the canonical correctness check for checkpoint diffs.
Secret scan still ran because secrets are always-on per bug-check policy.

next_actions: On the next source-touching commit, run a full bug-check (tsc, eslint, vitest, build, anti-patterns, secrets, npm audit).
